description: One who trades goods; a person who facilitates exchange between people. 'Piru' names who moves goods—bringing what is needed from where it is found.
sound_symbolism: The word exchanges with flow. 'Pi' balances with fair exchange, value matched. 'Ru' flows with goods moving, trade continuing.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'piru lo thena wisola.' (The trader exchanges goods.) Related to 'toloi' (messenger) as goods-mover to word-mover; works through 'wisola' (exchange).

pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Fair trade—exchange that benefits both parties, building trust across difference.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Trader as connector—linking communities through exchange of goods.
